									With over 5 years of experience in the industry or working on ERP solutions like Oracle, SAP, Salesforce, or PeopleSoft in financials, supply chain, order to cash (O2C), procure to pay (P2P), and service modules like ServiceNow, you will play a crucial role in ensuring customer success and performing product management duties. As a Product Manager, you will be instrumental in delivering and implementing ambitious solutions within the current platform, contributing to the development of next-generation, innovative Field Service and Asset Management ERP systems.
We seek a proactive, detail-oriented consultant with strong consulting and product management skills, capable of effective communication with users and strategic thinking. You will collaborate with business stakeholders, team members, and core stakeholders both offshore and on-site to understand and optimize business journeys and requirements. Additionally, you will identify and assess available technologies, recommending solutions that align with business needs and objectives.								</div>
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Requirements</h2>				</div>
<li>Experience of multiple, full lifecycle project implementations and ERP Product Management with experience in ERP Applications</li>
<li>Experience in ERP Asset Management / Supply Chain Management Areas</li>
<li>Prior Experience in designing Industry specific solutions in Utilities(Water/Gas/Electric) preferable</li>
					<h2 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">Responsibilities</h2>				</div>
<li>Design and implement best practice business solutions appropriate to the requirements, business needs and strategic direction of the organization</li>
<li>Communicate effectively, gather requirements, translate them to design and able to handle customer implementations</li>
<li>Excellent communication skills and ability to bring thought leadership</li>
